subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These two servants have turned their faces toward the Luminary of the horizons and the Light of the East, and have been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان هذین العبدین قد توجها الی نیر الخافقین و نور المشرقین و استضائا
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for the departed, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
